seoTitle: Womina vs Wonbah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Womina and Wonbah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Womina and Wonbah.
heading: Womina vs Wonbah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Womina, Queensland and Wonbah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Womina has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wonbah (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Womina or Wonbah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Womina has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Wonbah scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Womina scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Wonbah scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Womina or Wonbah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Womina has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
